programs.title: Killing All My Sisters
programs.desc: A college student uncovers an elite sorority's dark secrets when her best friend mysteriously disappears during rush week.

programs.title: Betrayed by My Bridesmaid
programs.desc: Soon after Katie's sister Connie, who was recently released from rehab, joins her wedding party, things unravel and test the dedication between Katie and fiance Tom. Katie learns that maid-of-honor Amanda may be framing Connie to get Tom for herself.

programs.title: Breaking Girl Code
programs.desc: After moving to a new city, Andi signs up for a friendship app called BFF to meet local women. However, her new relationship with Farrah soon turns dangerous when she realizes the woman's boyfriend is luring others through BFF.

programs.title: My Best Friend's Secret Life
programs.desc: Maggie is a teen who's happy to make a new friend, until she realizes she's being groomed for something much worse.

programs.title: Secret Love Triangle
programs.desc: When Jessica is charged with the murder of her best friend's husband, she escapes from jail and goes on the run with her spouse to clear her name. She soon untangles a deadly web of lust and deceit that leads directly to those she trusts the most.

programs.title: Whispers of a Secret Life
programs.desc: Jessica becomes alarmed when her best friend, Amanda, starts behaving erratically after an accident. When Amanda's reckless behavior threatens Jessica's family, she digs deep into her past and realizes she may not know her best friend at all.
